mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rewrite_results (user_id, resume_id, jd_id, match_result_id, rewrite_data, fidelity_score, rewrite_attempts, fidelity_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{resumeId}, #{jdId}, #{matchResultId}, #{rewriteData}::jsonb, #{fidelityScore}, #{rewriteAttempts}, #{fidelityStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, resume_id, jd_id, match_result_id, rewrite_data::text AS rewrite_data, fidelity_score, rewrite_attempts, fidelity_status, created_at FROM rewrite_results WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, resume_id, jd_id, match_result_id, rewrite_data::text AS rewrite_data, fidelity_score, rewrite_attempts, fidelity_status, created_at FROM rewrite_results WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} AND jd_id = #{jdId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
